indication: NERLYNX (neratinib) is indicated in combination with capecitabine for the treatment of patients with metastatic HER2-overexpressed/amplified breast cancer, who have received two or more prior anti-HER2-based regimens in the metastatic setting.
description: Health Canada approved neratinib in combination with capecitabine for the treatment of patients with metastatic HER2-overexpressed/amplified breast cancer, who have received two or more prior anti-HER2-based regimens in the metastatic setting.

document.name: Nerlynx (neratinib) [product monograph]. HC.
